title: rubus argutifrons
intro: Rubus argutifrons, also known as the Taiwan raspberry or mountain raspberry, is a species of raspberry native to Taiwan. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus argutifrons include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and digestive issues.
